topics.label: Installation & Inventory
topics.description: Install Ansible and define hosts in inventory files (INI or YAML).

topics.label: Ad-hoc Commands
topics.description: ansible host -m module -a args. Quick one-off tasks.

topics.label: Playbooks
topics.description: YAML playbooks with tasks, handlers, and plays. The core of Ansible automation.

topics.label: Modules
topics.description: apt, yum, copy, template, service, file, user. Hundreds of built-in modules.

topics.label: Variables & Templates
topics.description: Jinja2 templates, vars, facts, and register for capturing output.

topics.label: Roles
topics.description: Organize playbooks into reusable roles with tasks, handlers, templates, defaults.

topics.label: Ansible Galaxy
topics.description: Share and download community roles and collections.
